name: P3_Line28_TotalNumberofImmigrants[0]
tooltip: Part 5. Sponsor's Household Size. NOTE: Do not count any member of your household more than once. Persons you are sponsoring in this affidavit. Enter the total number of immigrants you are sponsoring on this affidavit which includes the principal immigrant listed in Part 3., any immigrants listed in Part 4., Item Numbers 4. - 7. and, any additional sponsored immigrants you listed in Part 11. Additional Information.  Do not count the principal immigrant if you are only sponsoring family members entering more than six months after the principal immigrant.

name: P5_Line2_Yourself[0]

name: P5_Line4_DependentChildren[0]
tooltip: Part 5. Sponsor's Household Size. Persons NOT sponsored in this affidavit. 4. If you have dependent children, enter the number here. (NOTE: Enter \2150\216 if you already counted your dependent children in Item Number 1.)

name: P5_Line5_OtherDependents[0]
tooltip: Part 5. Sponsor's Household Size. Persons NOT sponsored in this affidavit. 5. If you have any other dependents, enter the number here. (NOTE: Enter \2150\216 if you already counted your other dependents in Item Number 1.)

name: P5_Line6_Sponsors[0]
tooltip: Part 5. Sponsor's Household Size. Persons NOT sponsored in this affidavit. 6. If you have sponsored any other persons on Form I - 8 64 or Form I - 8 64 E  Z who are now lawful permanent residents and you are still obligated to support, enter the number here. (NOTE: Enter \2150\216 if you already counted these persons in Item Number 1.)

name: P5_Line7_SameResidence[0]
tooltip: Part 5. Sponsor's Household Size. Persons NOT sponsored in this affidavit. 7. If you have siblings, parents, or adult children with the same principal residence who are combining their income with yours by submitting Form I - 8 64. A., enter the number here. (NOTE: Enter \2150\216 if you already counted these persons in Item Number 1.)

name: Override[0]
tooltip: Part 5. Sponsor's Household Size. Persons NOT sponsored in this affidavit. 8. Add together Part 5., Item Numbers 1. through 7. and enter the number here. Household Size.
